raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Novelty claims are stated as absolutes without evidence, and prior work on clarifying questions in IR makes both claims contestable.",
    "R1.7": "The artifact provides a thorough audit of every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and engages with the scholarship at a high level.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty is disclosed for some clearly out-of-reach claims, but not consistently across all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers mostly within scope, but there are some minor drifts in the discussion of generalization to other domains.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but there is a risk of regressions due to the small sample size and engager-vs-control comparison.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some minor edits are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.75,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Novelty claims are stated as absolutes without evidence, and prior work on clarifying questions in IR makes both claims contestable.
rationale.R1.7: The artifact provides a thorough audit of every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and engages with the scholarship at a high level.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for some clearly out-of-reach claims, but not consistently across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope, but there are some minor drifts in the discussion of generalization to other domains.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but there is a risk of regressions due to the small sample size and engager-vs-control comparison.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some minor edits are not traced.
